_readme: Linear MCP server configuration. Linear is an alternative to Jira popular with product-led engineering teams.

_setup.1_get_token: Linear → Settings → API → Personal API keys

_tools_provided: linear_get_issue — fetch an issue by ID
linear_search_issues — search issues by title, status, assignee, or team
linear_create_issue — create a new issue in a team
linear_update_issue — update title, description, state, priority, assignee
linear_get_cycles — list active and upcoming cycles (sprints)
linear_get_teams — list teams in the workspace
_skill_pairings: skills/manager/backlog-refinement — query and update Linear issues
skills/manager/story-slicing — create child issues from an epic
skills/manager/engineering-metrics — cycle time data from Linear
